remission.spontaneous_remission_rate: Annual mortality ~22% on standard care; only 5-11% of HFrEF patients achieve normalisation of ejection fraction (HFrecEF) with GDMT; HFpEF has no disease-modifying therapy
remission.best_intervention_remission_rate: GDMT (ARNI + beta-blocker + MRA + SGLT2i) reduces CV mortality by 38% and hospitalization by 25% vs historical standard; reverse cardiac remodelling (EF improvement >10%) in 40-50% of HFrEF with full quadruple therapy; cardiac resynchronisation therapy (CRT) improves EF in 70% of LBBB patients
remission.gap_size: Large — quadruple GDMT dramatically underused; <25% of eligible HFrEF patients receive all four pillars
remission.barrier_detail: Full quadruple therapy guideline-endorsed since 2021 but implementation is poor; SGLT2i in HF still widely under-prescribed despite Class 1A recommendation; ARNI (sacubitril/valsartan) uptake slow due to cost
remission.last_soc_change: 2021 — ESC/ACC/AHA guidelines added SGLT2i as fourth pillar (EMPEROR-Reduced, DAPA-HF); ARNI as backbone replacing ACE/ARB since 2016 (PARADIGM-HF); beta-blocker/MRA foundation unchanged since 1999-2003
remission.outdated_treatments: ACE inhibitor without upgrading to ARNI in eligible patients; digoxin as routine add-on (no mortality benefit, toxicity risk; still widely used in AF + HF); high-dose diuretics without volume optimisation guided by invasive monitoring or bioimpedance
remission.adjunctive_emerging: Cardiac rehab (30% mortality reduction, under-referred); remote haemodynamic monitoring (CardioMEMS PA sensor reduces HF hospitalisations 28%); iron replacement IV (AFFIRM-AHF: reduces HF hospitalisation); dietary sodium restriction (evidence debated — SODIUM-HF trial null)
remission.frontier_signal: Mavacamten (myosin inhibitor, FDA approved 2022 for HCM; trials in HFpEF); omecamtiv mecarbil (cardiac myosin activator for HFrEF — Phase 3 GALACTIC-HF marginal benefit); gene therapy (AAV9-SERCA2a — Phase 2 AGENT-HF); cardiac organoid-based tissue therapy
remission.notes: Manually curated from landmark trials, registries, and guidelines (disease_db_100.json). Protected from automated overwrite.
